mapper.sql: record_id, user_id, recipe_id, food_name, meal_type, dining_time, intake_amount, calories_per_100g, estimated_calories, remark, record_status, created_time, last_change_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_diet_record ( user_id, recipe_id, food_name, meal_type, dining_time, intake_amount, calories_per_100g, estimated_calories, remark, record_status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{recipeId}, #{foodName}, #{mealType}, #{diningTime}, #{intakeAmount}, #{caloriesPer100g}, #{estimatedCalories}, #{remark}, #{recordStatus} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_diet_record SET recipe_id = #{recipeId}, food_name = #{foodName}, meal_type = #{mealType}, dining_time = #{diningTime}, intake_amount = #{intakeAmount}, calories_per_100g = #{caloriesPer100g}, estimated_calories = #{estimatedCalories}, remark = #{remark} WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND record_status = 0
